name: investiq
description: Fresh-data investment research agent harness for discovery, selection, entry, and exit decisions.

interface.longDescription: investiq helps users route investment research workflows to AI platforms they already subscribe to, including Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or manual agent sessions. It requires fresh web data, provenance, risk review, and human final decision-making.
defaultPrompt: investiq discover: find current investment opportunities
investiq entry: analyze whether a target is buyable now
investiq exit: review sell and stop-loss conditions
